meta.title: Bringing DevSecOps to ICS
meta.description:
Matt Franz found disclosed the first vulns in ICS back in 2007, and then he left the ICS world. In recent years he has lived in the DevOps world and discusses how this can help in ICS. 

He discusses his professional journey and how he went from breaking things to building and running applications and systems.

"In DevSecOps it is essential that security does not slow things down." Feedback loops and pain driving change is essential. Continual experimentation and change is the rule. "IT has lost, everything is about putting the tools and power in the developers' hands".

Matt talks about how he staffs and runs a DevSecOps team and what he has learned.
